_metadata.name: L1 - Windows Defender Firewall Baseline
_metadata.cisMapping: Firewall & Network: all profiles enabled, default-deny inbound
_metadata.rollback: Disable/delete this profile; Windows Firewall returns to its previous state. Test VPN/collaboration app inbound rules in Pilot ring first — this is the single most likely L1 control to need an app-specific exception.

name: ZeroTrust-L1-Firewall-Baseline
description: Enables Windows Defender Firewall on all three profiles (Domain/Private/Public) with default-deny inbound. Add app-specific allow rules as exceptions rather than disabling the profile.
